hero.desc: STARBRIGHT SOLUTIONS builds clearer websites, AI customer service, and automation systems — helping brands communicate better, serve customers faster, and run operations smoother.

services.title: What We Do
services.desc: Four core pillars of enterprise digitalization — from websites to AI chatbots, auto-reply systems to full workflow automation.

web.title: Business Websites & Web Systems
web.desc: Build stable, professional, scalable websites that balance brand presentation, business conversion, and long-term operations.

ai.title: AI Customer Service Bot
ai.desc: Handle common inquiries, product introductions, and pre-sales responses automatically — improving service efficiency and customer experience.

auto.title: Auto-Reply System
auto.desc: Cover forms, appointments, notifications, and fixed-scenario responses — reducing missed replies and repetitive handling.

workflow.title: Business Automation Solutions
workflow.desc: Connect lead flow, task assignment, approval collaboration, and more — making business processes more stable and controllable.

steps.title: A Clear Collaboration Process
steps.desc: Every step has clear deliverables and decision criteria, making the process smoother and reducing back-and-forth communication.

s1.title: Discovery
s1.desc: Confirm business goals, existing assets, and project scope. Set clear delivery standards to avoid misalignment.

s2.title: Solution Design
s2.desc: Content structure, visual system, and feature planning all move forward together — delivering an executable roadmap.

s3.title: Development & Launch
s3.desc: Execute the agreed plan through development and testing, then deploy — ensuring stable, reliable delivery.

s4.title: Continuous Optimization
s4.desc: Follow up on post-launch feedback and continuously adjust and optimize based on real usage.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.desc: Our solutions have been deployed across multiple industries, building deep vertical expertise.

products_section.title: Our Smart Products
products_section.desc: Built with cutting-edge AI and years of real-world business experience — products that actually work.

solutions_page.hero_title2: and Build a Stable Business Entry Point
solutions_page.hero_desc: We organize solutions around four directions — websites, AI customer service, automation, and data — so businesses can choose the right entry point based on real goals.
solutions_page.grid_title: Each Solution Can Be Deployed Independently
solutions_page.grid_desc: They can also be combined — built out progressively along the business chain without needing to start over.
solutions_page.process_desc: Unclear brand expression → prioritize website; Low consultation efficiency → add AI chatbot; Unstable lead flow → deploy automation; Need data-driven decisions → integrate analytics.
solutions_page.cta_title: Want to Confirm Which Solution Fits?
solutions_page.cta_desc: We can start with a requirements review, then decide whether to begin with the website, AI chatbot, automation, or data tools.
solutions_page.s1_intro: Build a corporate website, product site, or business landing page — keeping external expression, content structure, and conversion aligned.
solutions_page.s1_audience: Ideal for businesses needing website upgrades, brand rebuilds, product showcasing, lead generation, or multi-page conversion.
solutions_page.s1_detail: Focused on information architecture, page logic, and external presentation — not just building pages.
solutions_page.s2_intro: Turn FAQs, product introductions, and basic inquiries into a conversational smart entry point that handles high-frequency consultations.
solutions_page.s2_audience: Ideal for businesses with high inquiry volume, pressure on human support, and need for faster response.
solutions_page.s2_detail: Best placed at the website entry, pre-sales consultation, or service information entry.
solutions_page.s3_intro: Build a stable auto-reply mechanism around forms, appointments, notifications, or fixed workflows.
solutions_page.s3_audience: Ideal for teams needing lead confirmation, appointment reminders, message distribution, or fixed-scenario responses.
solutions_page.s3_detail: The focus is turning notifications and replies into standard processes — not ad hoc manual handling.
solutions_page.s4_intro: Connect lead flow, task assignment, approval collaboration, and more — so business actions run on rules.
solutions_page.s4_audience: Ideal for organizations looking to reduce manual operations, improve cross-department efficiency, and standardize workflows.
solutions_page.s4_detail: More focused on workflow orchestration and collaboration — not single-point function tools.
solutions_page.s5_intro: Turn traffic, conversions, consultations, and content performance into readable data views for better decisions.
solutions_page.s5_audience: Ideal for businesses needing to track website performance, evaluate campaigns, or optimize conversion paths.
solutions_page.s5_detail: The focus is making operational decisions clearer — not piling up reports.
solutions_page.p1_desc: Confirm current state, goals, and scope — identify where to start for maximum value.
solutions_page.p2_desc: Break goals into deliverable modules, evaluate priorities and implementation paths.
solutions_page.p3_desc: Execute step by step, maintain transparent communication, deliver with stability.
solutions_page.p4_desc: Continue follow-up post-launch, support future expansion and operational adjustments.

about_page.hero_desc1: Our reason for existing is straightforward: many businesses already have a website, but lack a digital entry point that truly handles inquiries, explains services, and connects workflows.
about_page.hero_desc2: We integrate websites, systems, AI interactions, and automation into one business logic — helping companies connect their external expression with internal operations.
about_page.brand_title: Helping businesses consolidate scattered presentation, consultation, notifications, and workflows into a clearer digital foundation.
about_page.brand_b1: Website · System · AI · Automation — in one unified logic
about_page.brand_b2: What to solve first matters more than how much you've done
about_page.brand_b3: Working after launch matters more than looking good before launch
about_page.cta_title: Want to Confirm Your Project Direction?
about_page.cta_desc: Tell us your business goals and current situation — we'll help identify the most suitable way to move forward.
about_page.svc1_desc: Build a stable, long-term website foundation around brand presentation, product introductions, consultations, and future expansion.
about_page.svc2_desc: Through intelligent Q&A and automated responses, improve consultation efficiency, reduce repetitive communication costs, and enhance customer experience.
about_page.svc3_desc: Streamline lead flow, task assignment, approval collaboration, and notification sync — improving process efficiency and management consistency.
about_page.svc4_desc: Integrate traffic, conversion, and consultation data to provide clearer insights for operations optimization.
about_page.val1_desc: Clarify business goals, use cases, and delivery boundaries first — then decide the order of structure, content, development, and launch. Reduce rework and give every step a clear basis for decision.
about_page.val2_desc: Many project problems aren't about doing too little — they're about not establishing priorities from the start. We care more about: what to solve first, why to do this first, and how to continue after.
about_page.val3_desc: Whether the project can continue to be used, evaluated, and expanded after launch. Future expansion builds on existing decisions — not overturning the structure.

industries_page.hero_desc: We address differences in business expression, customer handling, and workflow organization across industries — providing digital solutions closer to real needs.
industries_page.cards_desc: Understand core challenges in each industry to identify the best entry point.
industries_page.method_title: The Core Logic of Industry Adaptation
industries_page.method_p1: The key to industry adaptation isn't applying the same solution with different names — it's deeply understanding the decision logic of target customers in that industry: what they prioritize, what they're concerned about.
industries_page.method_p2: When page structure, case selection, consultation entry points, and process explanations are all built around this decision logic — content can truly serve conversion goals, not just display information.
industries_page.step1: Assess the industry and current business development stage
industries_page.step2: Identify core issues affecting consultation and onboarding efficiency
industries_page.step3: Determine priority entry point: Website / AI Chatbot / Automation
industries_page.step4: Build on existing foundations progressively — avoid unnecessary rebuilds
industries_page.cta_title: Not Sure Which Direction to Start With?
industries_page.cta_desc: Tell us your industry background and current business situation — we'll help evaluate the right entry point and prioritization.
industries_page.i1_challenge: Store information is fragmented, product display lacks clear hierarchy, and the customer journey from discovery to visit is disconnected — resulting in low consultation conversion.
industries_page.i1_approach: Integrate store website, product display, location navigation, appointment booking, and event information — building a complete guided path from online browsing to in-store visits.
industries_page.i1_value: Improve customer understanding efficiency and shorten the time cycle from awareness to decision to visit.
industries_page.i2_challenge: Brand character is hard to convey online, menu and package info lacks structure, and booking/consultation entry points are inconsistent — affecting visit decisions.
industries_page.i2_approach: Systematically present brand positioning, menu structure, and packages. Integrate booking forms, events, and instant consultation — reducing information acquisition costs.
industries_page.i2_value: Use structured online presentation to capture customer interest and reduce drop-off caused by information gaps.
industries_page.i3_challenge: Course offerings are extensive but differentiation is unclear, instructor credentials are hard to showcase, and enrollment paths are lengthy — affecting prospective student conversion.
industries_page.i3_approach: Build complete course introductions, instructor profiles, student case studies, and enrollment consultation paths — using structured content to establish credibility.
industries_page.i3_value: Through clear value communication and smooth enrollment paths, effectively convert interest into actual enrollment.
industries_page.i4_challenge: Clients prioritize evaluating professionalism and trustworthiness. Unsystematic content directly affects their willingness to enter deeper discussions.
industries_page.i4_approach: Use a professional website, service descriptions, case showcases, and consultation entry points to build clear evaluation criteria — guiding clients to proactively initiate collaboration.
industries_page.i4_value: Build a professional image that is understandable, trustworthy, and comparable — lowering barriers to communication and decision-making.
industries_page.i5_challenge: Frequent campaigns but long conversion paths — users frequently switch between products, promotions, and membership modules, causing traffic loss and conversion gaps.
industries_page.i5_approach: Unify product display, campaign landing pages, membership conversion modules, and behavioral tracking — optimize node connection efficiency from an overall operations perspective.
industries_page.i5_value: Drive conversions through page structure and data feedback working together — not by optimizing individual modules in isolation.
industries_page.i6_challenge: Business processes are fragmented, cross-department information flow relies on manual transmission, with excessive repetitive operations — affecting execution efficiency and management visibility.
industries_page.i6_approach: Deploy internal portals, process automation, task assignment, approval collaboration, and data dashboards — bring information flow and execution into a manageable system framework.
industries_page.i6_value: Improve team execution efficiency and process traceability, providing clear data support for management decisions.

faq_page.badge: FAQ Center · Service Overview · Collaboration Clarity
faq_page.hero_p1: This page isn't about filling space with questions — it's about clarifying the decision points where clients most commonly get stuck in website, system, and AI automation projects.
faq_page.hero_p2: If you're evaluating options, calculating budgets, or haven't decided on an entry point — browse these FAQs before deciding whether to contact us.
faq_page.check_title: We Recommend Confirming These Three Points First
faq_page.check1_label: What we do — and what we don't
faq_page.check2_label: How projects typically start and progress
faq_page.check3_label: When to reach out vs. when to observe
faq_page.check3_sub: Helping you judge the right timing
faq_page.groups_desc: We've grouped questions by service collaboration, project process, SEO & tech, AI automation, and industry fit
faq_page.g1_summary: Understand our service scope and the business scenarios we're best suited for
faq_page.g1_q1: What core services does STARBRIGHT SOLUTIONS provide?
faq_page.g1_a1: We primarily provide business website and web system development, AI customer service bots, auto-reply systems, business automation solutions, and digital support related to business presentation, consultation, and operational efficiency.
faq_page.g1_q2: Do you only build display-type websites, or can you build business systems too?
faq_page.g1_a2: We don't just build display websites — we can also develop lightweight systems, business tools, admin backends, and automation workflows. Our core goal is making websites and systems truly serve the business.
faq_page.g1_q3: What types of businesses are the best fit for working with you?
faq_page.g1_a3: Businesses looking to build a website, upgrade their brand, optimize customer consultation, reduce repetitive manual work, or improve online conversion. Also great for teams wanting to plan website, AI chatbot, and automation together.
faq_page.g2_summary: How projects start, progress, and what to prepare in advance
faq_page.g2_q1: What does the standard process look like if we want to start working together?
faq_page.g2_a1: We typically start by confirming business goals, page scope, and functional requirements — then proceed with solution planning, content organization, and development. We clarify scope, pace, and key milestones upfront.
faq_page.g2_q2: What materials should we prepare beforehand, and what can be added later?
faq_page.g2_a2: Having brand materials, reference websites, product introductions, service lists, or existing system descriptions will help us assess direction faster. If materials aren't complete yet, we can still start a conversation.
faq_page.g2_q3: If we only have a preliminary idea, can you help us structure it?
faq_page.g2_a3: Yes. Many projects don't start as complete plans. We'll help clarify business goals, page structure, feature priorities, and conversion paths — then decide what to do first.
faq_page.g3_summary: Assess whether website structure, experience, and extensibility will hold you back
faq_page.g3_q1: Will the website consider SEO and basic search visibility?
faq_page.g3_a1: Yes. We consider SEO in page structure, heading hierarchy, content organization, performance, and readability — making the site more aligned with search engine logic and easier for users to understand.
faq_page.g3_q2: After the website is built, is ongoing maintenance and updates easy?
faq_page.g3_a2: We choose the right technical solution and minimize maintenance barriers during delivery — including documentation, operation guides, and extensible structure. Long-term maintenance support can also be arranged.
faq_page.g3_q3: If we need to expand features or redesign after launch, do we need to start over?
faq_page.g3_a3: No. We consider future extensibility during the solution phase. Whether adding pages, modules, or iterating features — all can be done on the existing foundation without rebuilding from scratch.
faq_page.g4_summary: Assess whether AI chatbots and automation have a practical fit for your business
faq_page.g4_q1: Is an AI customer service bot really suitable for my business?
faq_page.g4_a1: If your business has high-frequency repetitive inquiries, needs 24/7 responses, operates across multiple channels, or wants to reduce manual costs — AI customer service usually delivers significant value.
faq_page.g4_q2: What does business automation mean? What are common real-world use cases?
faq_page.g4_a2: Business automation means using systems or bots to replace manual operations — like automatically routing inquiries, sending notifications, organizing data, and generating reports. The core goal is reducing repetitive work.
faq_page.g4_q3: Why should AI chatbot, auto-reply, and business automation often be planned together?
faq_page.g4_a3: They can be — and usually it's better to plan them together. This allows consultation entry, message flow, notification mechanism, and business logic to be designed as a unified system, reducing fragmentation.
faq_page.g5_summary: Assess whether the solution fits your industry and how post-launch maintenance works
faq_page.g5_q1: Can you design page content and messaging based on our industry?
faq_page.g5_a1: Yes. We adjust page structure, key messaging, and conversion paths based on industry characteristics — retail, F&B, education, finance, consulting, e-commerce, manufacturing, and enterprise management.
faq_page.g5_q2: What support is provided after project delivery?
faq_page.g5_a2: We typically provide delivery documentation, launch assistance, and post-launch issue recommendations. Specific support scope is confirmed per project — the focus is ensuring stable operation and easy iteration.
faq_page.g5_q3: Can we continue expanding pages or features after the initial delivery?
faq_page.g5_a3: Yes. We consider future expansion in the solution phase. Whether adding pages, content modules, or extending the website into a full business system — all can be progressed in stages.
faq_page.cta_left_p: Share your business goals, current situation, and biggest concerns — we'll help determine whether to start with the website, AI chatbot, automation, or structure and content first.
faq_page.cta_item1: Whether to start with the website or plan website and system together
faq_page.cta_item2: Whether to prioritize consultation conversion or internal efficiency first
faq_page.cta_item3: Whether to start development directly or begin with structure and content
faq_page.cta_right_p: If you have an existing site, product materials, or a preliminary plan — feel free to share and we'll help evaluate the right entry point and prioritization.

contact_page.hero_title2: Let's Find the Best Direction Together
contact_page.hero_p1: If you're planning a business website, web system, AI customer service, or automation project — feel free to submit your requirements. We'll provide clear, actionable recommendations based on your goals, budget, and timeline.
contact_page.hero_p2: You can also start by describing the core problem you're solving, the goals you want to achieve, and whether you have reference websites or existing systems.
contact_page.sidebar_item1: Planning a website upgrade to strengthen brand expression and consultation conversion
contact_page.sidebar_item2: Need a web system, lightweight tool, or business process automation
contact_page.sidebar_item3: Looking to plan AI chatbot, auto-reply, or lead handling workflows
contact_page.sidebar_item4: Only have a preliminary idea and want to start with requirements structuring
contact_page.intro_title: What You Can Tell Us First
contact_page.intro_desc: This section is just to help us see the project boundaries clearly
contact_page.icard1_desc: Low traffic, poor consultation conversion, outdated website, or internal process inefficiency — the more specific, the more accurate our assessment.
contact_page.icard2_desc: More leads, stronger brand image, lower manual reply costs, or a complete system infrastructure.
contact_page.icard3_desc: Reference websites, old website links, product introductions, or existing system descriptions will help us assess direction faster.
contact_page.icard4_desc: Is there a specific launch deadline, or do you plan to roll out in phases? Understanding the timeline helps create a realistic implementation plan.
contact_page.form_subtitle: After submitting, you'll be redirected to your email client to send directly to our inbox
contact_page.req_ph: Describe your project goals, functional requirements, current pain points, or reference cases — the more detail, the faster we can assess
contact_page.channels_desc: You can also reach out through any of these channels
contact_page.email_note: For formal requirements, quotes, and document sharing
contact_page.wa_note: Click to open a WhatsApp conversation directly
contact_page.tg_note: Click to open Telegram account directly
contact_page.response_note: Business days prioritized — for urgent matters, WhatsApp or Telegram is recommended

products_page.hero_desc: Built with cutting-edge AI and years of real-world business experience — products that actually work.

cta_section.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta_section.desc: If you have a website draft, existing site, product materials, or project goals — we can start from requirements gathering and move quickly into the solution phase.

footer.desc: Providing website development, AI customer service, and business automation solutions for enterprises. Helping brands communicate more clearly, serve customers more smoothly, and run operations more efficiently.
